Mounting root from ufs:/dev/ad0s2a

And system freezen. Rebooting not helps. 
Also system freezen while booting from original CD-ROM REALESE-4.4, and  REALESE-4.4 floppies !

Fix: 

Fix kernel 4.4 source !
How-To-Repeat: Boot system on 686b + KT133A motherboard with 4.4-REALESE kernel
